creator: kauselot@yahoo.com
text:
Canot start jails, sh -x jail reports the following error : unknown parameter: ip6.addr

This is the same problem that is supposedly fixed on 9.2 (PR 169028 )

Fix: 

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=169028
How-To-Repeat: create kernel without INET6
start jails
